title: OASIS 3.0.13
release_notes: Added x-info-oasis-version to generated OAS files so the originating OASIS build can be traced.
Added OAS Generation preferences to enable or disable x-info-creation-date, x-info-release, x-info-customization, and x-info-oasis-version independently.
Polished manual update-check dialogs so success and error messages use the OASIS dialog style and stay centered on the application window.
Kept release update metadata focused on published releases only.
